title: Chorizo
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Nickname}}
[[File:Tulon_squad.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Chorizo among [[Tulon's task force]].]]
'''Chorizo''' was the callsign of an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] assigned to a [[Tulon's task force|detachment]] commanded by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Beri Tulon]]. This detachment was intended to join with the forces of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brenn Tantor]] for the [[Massacre on Abridon]], but was instead completely destroyed when Tulon turned the guns of his [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]], [[Annihilator 1]], on his squad in an attempt to defect to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
